steps.title: Read the colon as a definition
steps.content: The colon signals that what follows defines the blank: the terraces, canals, and water temples are "joined together into a single cohesive unit." So the blank must mean linked together into one whole.

steps.title: Pick the word that names "joined together"
steps.content: A word meaning connected so that the parts form one unit fits the definition exactly.

steps.title: Eliminate per choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — outmoded: means out of date; says nothing about parts being joined — misreads the colon. ✗
  • Choice B — informal: describes tone, not connection between parts. ✗
  • Choice C — interconnected: directly means linked together into one whole, which the colon spells out. ✓
  • Choice D — optional: would mean the elements can be left out, contradicting "single cohesive unit." ✗
That is the correct answer.
